name: 09_Recommendation_System_NCF_MovieLens_ML
query: Nisaidie kuunda mfumo wa kupendekeza filamu kulingana na alama za watumiaji kutoka kwenye dataset ya MovieLens kwa kutumia mbinu ya Neural Collaborative Filtering (NCF). Kwanza, pakia dataset na igawanye katika seti za mafunzo na majaribio katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, tekeleza mbinu ya NCF na msingi wa matrix factorization katika `src/model.py`. Kwa kutumia hizi, chapisha mfano wa mapendekezo 10 bora kwa mtumiaji wa majaribio kwa mbinu ya NCF na msingi na uhifadhi katika `results/metrics/top_10_recommendations.txt`. Itakuwa vizuri ikiwa mapendekezo haya ya sampuli yatakuwa na maana kulingana na mtumiaji wa majaribio. Pima utendaji wa mfumo kwa kutumia RMSE, MAE, nk., na uhifadhi matokeo ya tathmini hii katika `results/metrics/evaluation_metrics.txt`. Jaribu kuhakikisha kwamba kuna utunzaji wa njia thabiti ambao unaweza kushughulikia saraka zinazokosekana na kadhalika wakati wa kuhifadhi faili.

requirements.criteria: Algoriti ya "Neural Collaborative Filtering (NCF)" imetekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Data imegawanywa katika seti za mafunzo na majaribio katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Msingi wa matrix factorization umetekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Mapendekezo 10 bora kwa mtumiaji wa majaribio chini ya mbinu ya "NCF" na msingi yamehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/top_10_recommendations.txt`.
Utendaji wa mfumo wa mapendekezo umepimwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na "RMSE" na "MAE," na matokeo yamehifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/evaluation_metrics.txt`.

preferences.criteria: Utunzaji wa njia thabiti umetekelezwa kushughulikia mambo kama saraka zinazokosekana.
Mapendekezo 10 bora yanapaswa kuwa wazi na yanayofaa kwa mapendeleo ya mtumiaji wa sampuli.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya "Neural Collaborative Filtering (NCF)" imetekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual implementation of the Neural Collaborative Filtering (NCF) algorithm. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — essentially a placeholder with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a stub function `build_model()` that returns a string placeholder. There is no actual NCF model code (e.g., no embedding layers, no MLP components, no GMF/NeuMF architecture, no PyTorch/TensorFlow model classes). The trajectory evidence also confirms no relevant implementation steps were found.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any actual MovieLens dataset loading. It contains only a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no real data loading logic. There is no download, import, or processing of the MovieLens dataset (e.g., no use of libraries like `pandas`, `requests`, or `torch`, and no reference to MovieLens data files or URLs). The trajectory also confirms no relevant operations related to MovieLens dataset loading were recorded.

judge_stats.criteria: Data imegawanywa katika seti za mafunzo na majaribio katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no actual data loading or train/test splitting logic. There is no use of any splitting mechanism (e.g., `train_test_split` from sklearn, or manual index splitting), no reference to the MovieLens dataset, and no actual separation of data into training and testing sets. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — confirming it does not fulfill the requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Msingi wa matrix factorization umetekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain any actual implementation of a matrix factorization baseline. Instead, it only contains a placeholder/stub code with a list of requirement criteria strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`) and a dummy `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no real matrix factorization algorithm (e.g., no embedding layers, no user/item factor matrices, no training logic) implemented anywhere in the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Mapendekezo 10 bora kwa mtumiaji wa majaribio chini ya mbinu ya "NCF" na msingi yamehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/top_10_recommendations.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/top_10_recommendations.txt` contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of actual top 10 movie recommendations for a test user generated by the NCF (Neural Collaborative Filtering) model. There are no real recommendation results (e.g., movie IDs, titles, or scores) present in the file. The trajectory evidence also confirms that there is no record of NCF model execution or any meaningful write operations to the results directory.

judge_stats.criteria: Utendaji wa mfumo wa mapendekezo umepimwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na "RMSE" na "MAE," na matokeo yamehifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/evaluation_metrics.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/evaluation_metrics.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value (`('placeholder\r\n', None)`) instead of actual RMSE and MAE evaluation metrics. No real model training or evaluation was performed, as confirmed by the trajectory evidence which states no evaluation steps were recorded. The requirement to measure and save RMSE and MAE metrics has not been fulfilled.
